network_summary: Dr. Muzaffar Mirza DDS operates a branded multi-location dental group ('Mirza Dental' / 'Muzaffar Mirza DDS & Associates') across at least 6 Chicagoland locations, coordinated by a named management entity 'Dental Management & Investments' headquartered at 140 Roosevelt Rd, Villa Park IL 60181. The AO cluster covers 3 of the 6 watched-IL GP locations (Villa Park, Summit, Chicago/Kedzie). No PE or external DSO platform backing found; founder-owned with an internal management-company layer. pe_backed=false.

This is the founder's own management entity — no external PE sponsor, DSO platform, or management-services agreement with a third party found. evidence_chain: AO signal: MUZAFFAR MIRZA appears as authorized official on 3 distinct NPI org records across ZIPs 60181 (Dental Care Center Ltd), 60501 (Summit Dental Center LLC), and 60632 (Kedzie 47 Dental LLC). Documentary corroboration: (1) mirzadental.com is a unified group website listing all three AO-cluster addresses plus 3 additional Chicagoland offices under the 'Muzaffar Mirza DDS & Associates' / 'Mirza Dental' brand. (2) The site explicitly states the group is 'managed by Dental Management & Investments' with a separate address (140 Roosevelt Rd) and phone. (3) BBB listing, Groupon, DentalPlans, and Facebook all confirm the Villa Park address as 'Dental Care Center Muzaffar Mirza DDS & Associates.' (4) No PE sponsor, acquisition news, or external MSO/DSO platform identified in web searches.
future_app_notes: 3 additional Mirza Dental locations not yet in the AO cluster (Addison Smiles ~190 N Swift Rd Addison, Cicero Dental Center ~1639 S Cicero Ave Cicero IL 60804, Taylor Dental Center ~4501 S State St Chicago IL 60609) — check whether their NPIs are in watched ZIPs and if Muzaffar Mirza appears as AO. Dental Management & Investments at 140 Roosevelt Rd may have its own NPI or IL business registration worth checking. Group claims 120+ jobs created in last 5 years — suggests active growth. Watch for any future PE acquisition of this platform.
